description: Represents an app that can be installed and used on the inTandem platform.

app_code_name.description: Unique code name of the app (e.g., "calendar_sync").

redirect_uri.description: The app main landing page. The platform uses this URI when opening the app.

app_host.description: Computed URL used by the platform to open the app (based on `redirect_uri` plus runtime query parameters).

url_params.description:
A list of standard platform context parameters that the platform injects into the query string when building `app_host`. Each value is a predefined key whose value is resolved at runtime by the platform (e.g., selecting "business_uid" causes the caller's business UID to be appended as `?business_uid=...`).

This is different from the `additional_params` entry in `extensions`, which defines custom, app-specific key-value pairs that are also appended to the URL.

app_types.description:
A list of app types / integration points associated with the app. This mirrors core's `app_type` field and is related to the app's extension configuration.

Valid values are based on core validation rules and may include internal-only values.

open_in_new_tab.description: Whether the app is opened in a new browser tab instead of an in-product iframe.

supported_in_mobile.description: Whether the app is supported in mobile experiences.

permissions.description: A list of permission codes required for certain app capabilities or UI entries (e.g., "can_view_payments").

trusted.description: Whether the app can skip the user consent screen when authorizing access.

oauth_redirect_uris.description: An array of URLs to redirect the user to after a successful OAuth login.

assignment_types.description: How the app is available to the caller. An app can have multiple assignment types simultaneously. Heuristics: `installed` and `internal` cannot happen at the same time. The only combination is `installed` + `directory_offering`.

owner.description: Whether the caller is the owner of the app. For Internal tokens, apps with no owning directory are returned with `owner=true`.

app_market.description: App market metadata shown to users in the app market.

logo.description: Public URL to the app logo (e.g., "https://cdn.example.com/apps/calendar_sync/logo.png").

short_description.description: Short description displayed in app cards (e.g., "Two-way sync with your calendar").

text.description: Long description displayed in the app details page.

app_features.description: A list of app features displayed in the app market.

app_screenshot_uris.description: Links to screenshots or demo videos shown on desktop.

app_mobile_screenshot_uris.description: Links to screenshots or demo videos shown on mobile.

supported_countries.description: Countries in which the app is available. Use full country names (e.g., "United States"). Use an empty array for all countries.

privacy_policy_link.description: Link to the app privacy policy.

contact_support_link.description: Link to the app contact support page.

personal_connection.description: Whether each staff member needs to connect separately to the app.

internal.description: Internal-only app metadata. Available only for Internal tokens.

full_screen.description: Whether the app is opened in a full screen mode.

deep_link.description: Deep link to an inner product page.

path_params.description: Optional query parameters to be added to the URL.

extensions.description: Developer-provided extension configuration entries. Each entry contains a `type` key identifying the extension and a `value` key holding its configuration. Only extensions with non-empty values are included. The array contains at most one entry per `type`.

oneOf.description: Menu items extension. Adds entries to the left sidebar navigation.

subitems.description: Menu items to be added to the left sidebar.

category.description: Section of the left menu in which the item will appear.

item_name.description: Item names per language code (e.g., `{ "en": "My Page" }`).

route.description: Suffix route relative to the app domain.

display_order.description: Display order within the category. Starts from 0.

block_impersonation.description: Whether the menu item should be blocked during impersonation.

permissions.description: Optional permissions required to see this menu item.

oneOf.description: Additional params extension. Defines custom, app-specific key-value query parameters appended to `app_host` when opening the app.

value.description: Custom key-value query parameters appended to the app URL.

oneOf.description: Deep link extension. Configures a deep link to an inner product page.

path_params.description: Optional query parameters to be added to the URL.

oneOf.description: Old integration name extension. Identifies the app as a legacy integration.
Personal connection extension. Indicates whether each staff member needs to connect separately to the app.
Full screen extension. Indicates whether the app opens in full screen mode.

value.description: Whether the app opens in full screen mode.

created_at.description: Timestamp indicating when the app was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp indicating when the app was last updated.

description.short_description: Two-way sync between your calendar and inTandem bookings.
description.text: Sync bookings to your calendar automatically and avoid double-booking across devices.
